completed: Mentioned in README and FEATURES constants
next_steps: Set up Make.com account and QuickBooks sandbox connection

key_decisions: Use Make.com for Phase 1 (fast, low cost, reliable for MVP)
Move to native integration only after revenue justifies the effort

Keep it simple for small/mid carriers
blockers: Need QuickBooks Developer App approval / sandbox access
